item.title: OnAir 3.31
item.description:
What's New in OnAir 3.31

  • New: Webhook support — send POST notifications when calls start or end.
  • New: Monitoring Hours — auto-start and stop monitoring on a schedule.
  • New: Brave Browser support for web meeting detection.
  • Redesigned Settings screen with clearer Device, Actions, and General sections.
  • Improved login items setup screen with new design.
  • Shortcut confirmation window always uses dark mode.
  • Shortcut confirmation avoids overlapping macOS Focus Mode notifications.
  • Fixed web meetings ending prematurely after 10 seconds (dead process check).
  • Monitoring always starts on launch (removed Start Monitoring on Launch toggle).
  • Menu items renamed to Start/Stop Monitoring for clarity.
